stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced a major breakthrough in its next-generation Blackwell AI chip architecture, promising 4x performance gains for data centers. Economically, this accelerates enterprise AI adoption, boosting capex in cloud computing. Market psychology: Triggers FOMO among investors fearing missing the AI wave. Historical parallel: Similar to the 2023 ChatGPT-fueled rally. Analogies: Like pouring gasoline on the AI bonfire; a quantum leap in silicon supremacy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal positive coverage on chip launch; X posts show overwhelming bullish sentiment with high engagement on AI future (semantic search score >0.25). Analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy/hold for 10-15% upside in 1-2 weeks on momentum.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or small short if overbought RSI>80, potential 3-5% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Valuation bubble burst, supply chain delays, competition from AMD.

stocks.justification: Concrete product announcement with immediate after-hours surge; strong historical precedent.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla reported Q4 2025 earnings beating estimates by 15% on EV deliveries and energy storage growth. Economic: Signals resilient demand amid rate cuts. Psychology: Reinforces Elon Musk halo effect. Parallels: Post-2020 delivery beats. Analogies: Like a cybertruck smashing through bearish walls; battery of optimism for autonomy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings call highlights robotaxi progress; X keyword search shows #TSLA trending positive, min_faves high.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory hurdles for FSD, China competition.

stocks.justification: Solid beat but high expectations baked in.

stocks.impact_theory: FAA launched probe into latest 737 MAX incident, halting deliveries. Economic: Delays $10B+ revenue. Psychology: Renewed safety fears erode confidence. Parallels: 2019 MAX crisis (-20%). Analogies: Like a plane grounded mid-flight; trust parachute failure.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Negative headlines dominate web; X semantic search reveals panic selling sentiment.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid or wait for dip buy at $170.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Resolution faster than expected, govt bailout.

stocks.justification: Regulatory actions historically cause sharp drops.

stocks.impact_theory: Announced expanded partnership with NVIDIA for AI servers, backlog +50%. Economic: Fuels data center buildout. Psychology: Piggyback on NVDA hype. Parallels: 2024 AI server surge. Analogies: The chassis to NVDA's engine; AI infrastructure gold rush.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Synergistic news with NVDA; positive X buzz.

stocks.justification: Tied to NVDA but smaller cap higher beta.

stocks.impact_theory: Secured $500M US Army AI contract. Economic: Govt spending on defense AI. Psychology: Validates commercial pivot. Parallels: Post-IPO contract wins. Analogies: Crystal ball for military intel; data oracle strikes gold.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Govt contracts reliable revenue; X posts hype 'PLTR to moon'.
